args.task: Read file window around line 40 to 60 to find field declarations and constructor for RowConsumerToResultReceiver.
Replace field 'private BatchIterator<Row> activeIt;' with 'private CompletableFuture<BatchIterator<Row>> suspendedIt = new CompletableFuture<>();'.
Replace constructor lambda parameter from (res, err) to (_, err) in completionFuture.whenComplete.
Replace consumeIt method body to add logic for suspending and resuming with maxRows and rowCount checks, using suspendedIt CompletableFuture.
Replace closeAndFinishIfSuspended method body to close suspended iterator and complete completionFuture.
Replace suspended method body to return suspendedIt.isDone() instead of activeIt != null.
Replace replaceResultReceiver method body to reset rowCount and suspendedIt, and update resultReceiver and maxRows.
Replace toString method body to include suspendedIt instead of activeIt.

args.new_body:
return "RowConsumerToResultReceiver{" +
           "resultReceiver=" + resultReceiver +
           ", maxRows=" + maxRows +
           ", rowCount=" + rowCount +
           ", activeIt=" + suspendedIt +
           '}';
